rationale: In the citing paper, Corstjens and Lal (2000) appears in a single grouped citation used to support a general background claim that some retailers develop high-quality private labels. This reference is part of a brief motivation for why the private-label effect on dips could go either way, but the paper does not build its theory, model, or empirical design around that study specifically. The cited paper is not revisited in the results or interpretation beyond that contextual mention.
